meaning: n.婆罗洲(一半属马来西亚,一半属印尼)
examples: Raffles' pitcher plant, from the jungles of Borneo, produces nectar that both lures insects and forms a slick surface on which they can't get a grip.
Trips that many adults would consider the adventure of a lifetime—treks in Borneo, a sports tour to Barbados—appear to have become almost routine at some state schools.
Look at Borneo, where you instantly think of the orang-utans.
There were no roads, electricity, telephones or even a mail service in Borneo at that time.
Sometimes the offices for Borneo Nature Tours in Lahad Datu can arrange reservations and transport.
